task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the Compliance-Audit-Findings note in the Projects workspace to understand the required remediation actions
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating to and opening the Compliance-Audit-Findings note. The note content — including both findings (incorrect publication location and outdated DPA) and the post-remediation requirements — is visible in the browser.

task_completion.description: Agent unpublishes Security-Policy-2024 from General Publications, updates Description to include SOX-2025-Q1 and Coverage to north-america, creates a major version (1.0+), and publishes it to Compliance > Regulatory Filings
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show: (1) the agent locating and removing the existing publication from General Publications (via the Publication tab, section navigation, or document actions), (2) editing the document metadata with Description updated to include 'SOX-2025-Q1' and Coverage set to 'north-america' in the edit form, (3) creating a major version using the version creation dialog with 'Major' selected (version label becomes 1.0 or higher), and (4) publishing to the Regulatory Filings sub-section under Compliance using the Publish action and navigating the section tree.

task_completion.description: Agent replaces the Data-Processing-Agreement file with DPA_v3_signed.pdf, adds gdpr-compliant tag, creates a major version (1.0+), removes external-reviewer Read access, and publishes to Legal > Legal Archive
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show: (1) using the Replace function on the document's PDF attachment to upload /home/ga/nuxeo/data/DPA_v3_signed.pdf via the file browser, (2) adding the tag 'gdpr-compliant' using the tag input field, (3) creating a major version (version label becomes 1.0 or higher), (4) navigating to the Permissions tab and removing the external-reviewer user's Read access entry, and (5) publishing to the Legal Archive sub-section under Legal.

task_completion.description: Agent creates a Note titled Remediation-Summary in the Projects workspace listing each remediated document's title, new version number, and target section
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows a Note document titled 'Remediation-Summary' in the Projects workspace with structured content that mentions both Security-Policy-2024 and Data-Processing-Agreement, includes their version numbers (1.0 or higher), and names the sections they were published to (Regulatory Filings and Legal Archive).

task_completion.description: Agent creates a collection named Q1-2025-Compliance-Bundle and adds both remediated documents plus the Remediation-Summary note to it (3 members total)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows a collection named 'Q1-2025-Compliance-Bundle' containing exactly 3 documents: Security-Policy-2024, Data-Processing-Agreement, and Remediation-Summary. The collection view lists all three members.

task_completion.description: All remediation actions completed correctly with no collateral damage — no unrelated documents modified, deleted, or permissions changed
task_completion.visual_evidence: Final screenshots show the Projects workspace in a clean state with all original documents intact alongside the new Remediation-Summary note. The Compliance-Audit-Findings reference note is unchanged. No error dialogs or unexpected state visible.

integrity.description: All actions performed through Nuxeo Web UI in Firefox
integrity.visual_evidence: All screenshots show Nuxeo Web UI in Firefox. No terminal windows, browser console, REST API clients, or developer tools visible.

integrity.description: Agent demonstrates genuine step-by-step remediation workflow through natural UI navigation
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a natural progression: reading audit findings, then navigating to each document, performing the required operations using standard Nuxeo UI elements (edit forms, publish dialogs, permission panels, version creation dialogs).

integrity.description: No use of terminal commands, text editors, browser developer tools, or direct API calls to bypass the Nuxeo Web UI
integrity.visual_evidence: No screenshots showing terminal windows, code editors, browser developer tools console, curl commands, or any other mechanism to modify Nuxeo state outside the standard Web UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Compliance-Audit-Findings note in Projects details two findings: (1) Security-Policy-2024 is wrongly published to General-Publications and must be unpublished, have Description updated to 'SOX-2025-Q1 — Enterprise information security policy for fiscal year 2024' and Coverage set to 'north-america', be versioned to 1.0+, and republished to Compliance > Regulatory-Filings (a sub-section under Compliance). (2) Data-Processing-Agreement needs its main file replaced with /home/ga/nuxeo/data/DPA_v3_signed.pdf, tagged 'gdpr-compliant', versioned to 1.0+, have the 'external-reviewer' user's Read permission removed, and be published to Legal > Legal-Archive (a sub-section under Legal). Post-remediation: create a Note titled 'Remediation-Summary' in Projects listing document titles, version numbers, and target sections. Create a collection 'Q1-2025-Compliance-Bundle' containing both remediated documents plus the Remediation-Summary note (3 members total). Sections have a two-level hierarchy: Compliance > Regulatory-Filings and Legal > Legal-Archive.
